statements.select: SELECT a.USERNO,a.PWD,a.USERNAME,a.IDNO,a.BIRTHDAY,a.UNITID,a.GRPID,a.EMAIL ,a.AUTHSTATUS,a.AUTHDATES,a.AUTHDATEE,a.ERRCT,a.APPDATE ,a.MODUSERID,a.MODUSERNAME,a.MODTIME,a.MODIP ,a.CHANGEPWD_REQUIRED,a.LASTLOGINTIME ,(SELECT b.TEXT FROM CODE1 b WHERE b.ITEM='UNIT' AND a.UNITID = b.CODE) AS UNIT_NAME ,(SELECT c.GRPNAME FROM AMGRP c WHERE c.GRPID=a.GRPID) AS GRP_NAME FROM AMDBURM a WHERE a.USERNO=#USERNO#
SELECT A.GRPID, B.GRPNAME FROM AMDBURM A inner join AMGRP B ON B.GRPID=A.GRPID where A.USERNO=#USERNO#

SELECT DISTINCT A.SYSID ,A.MODULES,A.SUBMODULES,A.PRGID,A.PRGNAME,A.PRGORDER,A.SHOWMENU,A.QUERYSTRING,A.MODUSERID,A.MODUSERNAME,A.MODTIME,A.MODIP FROM AMFUNCM A INNER JOIN AMGMAPM B ON B.SYSID = A.SYSID AND B.MODULES = A.MODULES AND B.SUBMODULES = B.SUBMODULES AND B.PRGID = A.PRGID INNER JOIN AMDBURM C ON C.GRPID = B.GRPID WHERE A.SHOWMENU = '1' AND (B.PRG_I <> '0' OR B.PRG_U <> '0' OR B.PRG_D <> '0' OR B.PRG_Q <> '0' OR B.PRG_P <> '0') AND C.USERNO=#USERNO# ORDER BY A.PRGORDER,A.SYSID,A.MODULES,A.SUBMODULES,A.PRGID
SELECT * FROM AMFUNCM WHERE SYSID='A2' AND MODULES<>' ' AND SHOWMENU = '1' AND PRGID = ' ' order by SYSID, MODULES, SUBMODULES,PRGORDER
SELECT * FROM AMFUNCM WHERE SYSID='A3' AND MODULES<>' ' AND SHOWMENU = '1' AND PRGID = ' ' order by SYSID, MODULES, SUBMODULES,PRGORDER
SELECT * FROM AMFUNCM WHERE SYSID='AM' AND MODULES<>' ' AND SHOWMENU = '1' AND PRGID = ' ' order by SYSID, MODULES, SUBMODULES,PRGORDER

SELECT c.PRGNAME AS Name1, b.PRGNAME AS Name2, a.PRGNAME AS Name3 FROM AMFUNCM a LEFT JOIN AMFUNCM b ON a.SYSID=b.SYSID AND a.MODULES=b.MODULES AND b.SUBMODULES=' ' AND b.PRGID=' ' LEFT JOIN AMFUNCM c ON a.SYSID=c.SYSID AND c.MODULES=' ' AND c.SUBMODULES=' ' AND c.PRGID=' ' WHERE a.PRGID=#PRGID#

SELECT a.id, a.username, a.logtype, CONVERT(NVARCHAR,a.createtime,120) AS createtime, a.ip, a.message, a.useragent FROM loginlog a LEFT JOIN AMDBURM b1 ON a.username=b1.USERNO LEFT JOIN AMDBURM b2 ON a.username=b2.EMAIL WHERE ISNULL(b1.USERNO, b2.USERNO)=#username# AND a.logtype = 'LOGINFAIL' AND a.message LIKE '%密碼錯誤%' ORDER BY a.createtime DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.USERNO) AS ROWID, a.USERNO, a.USERNAME, a.IDNO, a.BIRTHDAY, a.EMAIL, a.UNITID, b.TEXT AS UNIT_NAME, a.GRPID, c.GRPNAME AS GRP_NAME, a.AUTHSTATUS, a.AUTHDATES, a.AUTHDATEE, a.LASTLOGINTIME FROM AMDBURM a LEFT JOIN CODE1 b ON a.UNITID=b.CODE AND b.ITEM='UNIT' /*AND b.CODE>0*/ LEFT JOIN AMGRP c ON a.GRPID=c.GRPID WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(a.USERNO) = UPPER(#USERNO#) AND UPPER(a.USERNAME) LIKE '%' + UPPER(#USERNAME#) + '%' AND a.UNITID LIKE '%' + #UNITID# + '%' AND a.GRPID LIKE '%' + #GRPID# + '%' AND a.AUTHSTATUS LIKE '%' + #AUTHSTATUS# + '%' AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.LASTLOGINTIME, 112) >= #LASTLOGIN_S# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.LASTLOGINTIME, 112) <= #LASTLOGIN_E#
ORDER BY a.GRPID

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.USERNO) AS ROWID, a.USERNO, a.USERNAME, a.IDNO, a.BIRTHDAY, a.EMAIL, a.UNITID, b.TEXT AS UNIT_NAME, a.GRPID, c.GRPNAME AS GRP_NAME, a.AUTHSTATUS, a.AUTHDATES, a.AUTHDATEE, a.LASTLOGINTIME FROM AMDBURM a LEFT JOIN CODE1 b ON a.UNITID=b.CODE AND b.ITEM='UNIT' /*AND b.CODE>0*/ LEFT JOIN AMGRP c ON a.GRPID=c.GRPID WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(a.USERNO) LIKE '%' + UPPER(#USERNO#) + '%' AND UPPER(a.USERNAME) LIKE '%' + UPPER(#USERNAME#) + '%' AND a.UNITID LIKE '%' + #UNITID# + '%' AND a.GRPID LIKE '%' + #GRPID# + '%' AND a.AUTHSTATUS LIKE '%' + #AUTHSTATUS# + '%' AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.LASTLOGINTIME, 112) >= #LASTLOGIN_S# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.LASTLOGINTIME, 112) <= #LASTLOGIN_E#
ORDER BY a.GRPID
statements.update: UPDATE Teacher SET IDNO = #IDNO#, TeacherName = #TeacherName#, UnitCode = #UnitCode#, Birthday = #Birthday#, Email = #Email#, UpdatedAccount = #UpdatedAccount#, UpdatedDatetime = #UpdatedDatetime# WHERE ACCOUNT=#ACCOUNT#
statements.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.GRPID) AS ROWID, a.GRPID, a.GRPNAME FROM AMGRP a WHERE 1=1
AND a.GRPID LIKE '%' + #GRPID# + '%' AND a.GRPNAME LIKE '%' + #GRPNAME# + '%'
ORDER BY a.GRPID

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.GRPID) AS ROWID, #GRPID# AS GRPID, B.SYSID, B.MODULES, B.SUBMODULES, B.PRGID, B.PRGNAME, ISNULL(A.PRG_Q,0) as PRG_Q, ISNULL(A.PRG_I,0) as PRG_I, ISNULL(A.PRG_U,0) as PRG_U, ISNULL(A.PRG_D,0) as PRG_D, ISNULL(A.PRG_P,0) as PRG_P FROM AMGMAPM A RIGHT OUTER JOIN AMFUNCM B ON A.SUBMODULES = B.SUBMODULES AND A.MODULES = B.MODULES AND A.PRGID = B.PRGID AND A.SYSID = B.SYSID WHERE B.OPENAUTH=1 AND B.SHOWMENU=1 AND A.SYSID=#SYSID# AND A.MODULES=#MODULES# ORDER BY B.PRGORDER

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY $OrderField$ $OrderField_ASC_DESC$) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.PostType, a.PostTo, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 120) AS PostDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 120) AS PostDateE, a.PostCaption, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MsgPost a WHERE ISNULL(a.Actived,'Y')!='N'
AND a.PostType = #PostType# AND a.PostTo = #PostTo# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 112) >= #PostDateS_A# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 112) <= #PostDateS_B# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 112) >= #PostDateE_A# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 112) <= #PostDateE_B# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 112) >= #UpdatedDatetime_A# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 112) <= #UpdatedDatetime_B# AND a.PostCaption + CAST(a.PostContent AS nvarchar(4000)) LIKE '%' + #KeyWord# + '%'
ORDER BY $OrderField$ $OrderField_ASC_DESC$

SELECT a.Seq, a.PostType, a.PostCaption, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 120) AS PostDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 120) AS PostDateE, a.PostTo, a.PostContent, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.IsOnTop, a.IsShowSignUp, a.MeetingSeq, b.MeetingName AS MeetingSeq_Name, a.PublishedUnit, a.OrderBy, a.Actived, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MsgPost a LEFT JOIN Meeting b ON a.MeetingSeq=b.Seq WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.MsgPostSeq, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MsgPostAttached a WHERE a.MsgPostSeq=#Seq#
statements.update: UPDATE MsgPost SET PostType = #PostType#, PostCaption = #PostCaption#, PostDateS = #PostDateS#, PostDateE = #PostDateE#, PostTo = #PostTo#, PostContent = #PostContent#, FileNameOrg = #FileNameOrg#, FileNameNew = #FileNameNew#, IsOnTop = #IsOnTop#, IsShowSignUp = #IsShowSignUp#, MeetingSeq = #MeetingSeq#, PublishedUnit = #PublishedUnit#, OrderBy = #OrderBy#, Actived = #Actived#, UpdatedAccount = #UpdatedAccount#, UpdatedDatetime = #UpdatedDatetime# WHERE Seq=#Seq#
UPDATE MsgPost SET Actived='N', UpdatedAccount=#UpdatedAccount#, UpdatedDatetime=GETDATE() WHERE Seq=#Seq#
statements.select: WITH WC1 AS ( SELECT a.id,a.username,a.logtype,a.createtime,a.ip,a.message,a.useragent FROM LOGINLOG A LEFT JOIN CDHOLIDAY B ON CONVERT(date,B.HOLDATE)=CONVERT(date,A.CREATETIME) WHERE ((FORMAT(A.CREATETIME,'HH:mm:ss')>='00:00:00' AND FORMAT(A.CREATETIME,'HH:mm:ss')<='06:00:00') OR B.REASON IS NOT NULL) AND YEAR(A.CREATETIME)=#ExpYear_Tab1# AND MONTH(A.CREATETIME)=#ExpMonth_Tab1# ) SELECT a.id,a.username,a.logtype,CONVERT(VARCHAR,a.createtime,120) createtime,a.ip,a.message,a.useragent ,b.username usr_name,bc.text unit_name,cc.grpname grp_name FROM WC1 A JOIN AMDBURM B ON A.USERNAME=B.USERNO JOIN CODE1 BC ON BC.CODE=B.UNITID AND BC.ITEM='UNIT' JOIN AMGRP CC ON CC.GRPID=B.GRPID ORDER BY a.createtime DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.createtime DESC) AS ROWID, a.id, a.username, a.logtype, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.createtime, 120) AS createtime, a.ip, a.message, a.useragent, b.USERNAME AS USER_NAME FROM loginlog a LEFT JOIN AMDBURM b ON a.username=b.USERNO WHERE 1=1
AND CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.createtime, 111) >= #CreateTime_A_Tab1# AND CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.createtime, 111) <= #CreateTime_B_Tab1# AND SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.createtime, 108), 1, 5) >= #CreateTime_C_Tab1# AND SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.createtime, 108), 1, 5) <= #CreateTime_D_Tab1# AND a.logtype = #FilterType_Tab1# AND a.username = #FilterAccount_Tab1#
ORDER BY a.createtime DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.createtime DESC) AS ROWID, a.id, a.username, a.logtype, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.createtime, 120) AS createtime, a.logfunc, a.result, a.filename, a.message, b.USERNAME AS USER_NAME FROM filelog a LEFT JOIN AMDBURM b ON a.username=b.USERNO WHERE 1=1
AND SUBSTRING(a.createtime,1,10) >= #CreateTime_A_Tab2# AND SUBSTRING(a.createtime,1,10) <= #CreateTime_B_Tab2# AND SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.createtime, 108), 1, 5) >= #CreateTime_C_Tab2# AND SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.createtime, 108), 1, 5) <= #CreateTime_D_Tab2# AND a.logtype + ' ' + a.result = #FilterType_Tab2# AND a.username = #FilterAccount_Tab2#
ORDER BY a.createtime DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.createtime DESC) AS ROWID, a.id, a.username, a.logtype, a.logfunc, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.createtime, 120) createtime, a.arg, a.result, b.USERNAME AS USER_NAME FROM funclog a LEFT JOIN AMDBURM b ON a.username=b.USERNO WHERE 1=1
AND SUBSTRING(a.createtime,1,10) >= #CreateTime_A_Tab3# AND SUBSTRING(a.createtime,1,10) <= #CreateTime_B_Tab3# AND SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.createtime, 108), 1, 5) >= #CreateTime_C_Tab3# AND SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.createtime, 108), 1, 5) <= #CreateTime_D_Tab3# AND a.logfunc IN (SELECT ISNULL(aa.value,'') FROM STRING_SPLIT(#FilterFunc_Tab3#,',') aa) AND a.logtype LIKE '%' + #FilterType_Tab3# + '%' AND a.username = #FilterAccount_Tab3#
ORDER BY a.createtime DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.UnitCode, a.TeacherName) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.ACCOUNT, a.IDNO, a.UnitCode, a.Sex, a.TeacherName, a.TeacherEName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.Birthday, 111) AS Birthday, a.IsShowBirthday, a.Tel, a.IsShowTel, a.Phone, a.IsShowPhone, a.PostalCode1, a.PostalCode2, a.Address, a.IsShowAddress, a.Email, a.IsShowEmail, a.EmailWork, a.IsShowEmailWork, a.EduLevelHighest, a.EduSchool1, a.EduDept1, a.EduLevel1, a.EduSchool2, a.EduDept2, a.EduLevel2, a.EduSchool3, a.EduDept3, a.EduLevel3, a.ServiceUnit1, a.JobTitle1, a.ServiceUnit2, a.JobTitle2, a.ExpertiseDesc, a.ExpertiseCode, a.TeachJobAbilityDC, a.TeachJobAbilityBC, a.TeachJobAbilityKC, a.TeachArea, a.TeachIndustryDetCode, a.WorkHistory, a.ProLicense, a.SelfIntroduction, a.SelfPicPath, a.PublicCore, a.Online, a.JoinYear, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.OfflineDate, 111) AS OfflineDate, a.OfflineReason, a.OfflineReasonRemark, a.HomePageCarousel, a.CreatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.CreatedDatetime, 120) AS CreatedDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM Teacher a LEFT JOIN Edu b ON a.EduLevelHighest=b.EduLevel WHERE 1=1
AND a.Email LIKE '%' + #Email# + '%' AND a.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%' AND a.IDNO = #IDNO#
AND ( ISNULL(a.TeacherName,'') + ',' + ISNULL(a.TeacherEName,'') + ',' + ISNULL(CAST(a.ExpertiseDesc AS NVARCHAR),'') + (SELECT ',' + bb.ExpertiseName FROM STRING_SPLIT(ISNULL(a.ExpertiseCode,''), ',') aa LEFT JOIN Expertise bb ON aa.value=bb.ExpertiseCode FOR XML PATH('')) ) LIKE '%' + #Keyword# + '%'
AND a.TeachJobAbility$TeachUnit_forSQL$ = 'Y'
AND ( SELECT COUNT(bb.value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachArea,',') aa LEFT JOIN STRING_SPLIT(#TeachArea_forSQL#,',') bb ON '%' + aa.value + '%' LIKE '%' + bb.value + '%' )>0
AND ( SELECT COUNT(aa.value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(#LiveArea_forSQL#,',') aa WHERE a.Address LIKE '%' + aa.value + '%' )>0
AND ( SELECT COUNT(aa.IndustryMstCode) FROM IndustryDet aa WHERE aa.IndustryCode IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachIndustryDetCode,',')) AND aa.IndustryMstCode=#Industry# )>0
ORDER BY a.UnitCode, a.TeacherName

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY $OrderField$ $OrderField_ASC_DESC$) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.Caption, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.DateS, 120) AS DateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.DateE, 120) AS DateE, a.IsOnTop, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM Notices a WHERE 1=1
AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.DateS, 112) >= #DateS_A# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.DateS, 112) <= #DateS_B# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.DateE, 112) >= #DateE_A# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.DateE, 112) <= #DateE_B# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 112) >= #UpdatedDatetime_A# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 112) <= #UpdatedDatetime_B# AND a.Caption LIKE '%' + #KeyWord# + '%'
ORDER BY $OrderField$ $OrderField_ASC_DESC$

SELECT a.Seq, a.Caption, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.DateS, 120) AS DateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.DateE, 120) AS DateE, a.IsOnTop, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM Notices a WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.NoticesSeq, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM NoticesAttached a WHERE a.NoticesSeq=#Seq#
statements.update: UPDATE Notices SET Caption = #Caption#, DateS = #DateS#, DateE = #DateE#, IsOnTop = #IsOnTop#, UpdatedAccount = #UpdatedAccount#, UpdatedDatetime = #UpdatedDatetime# WHERE Seq=#Seq#
statements.select: SELECT a.Seq, a.ACCOUNT, a.IDNO, a.UnitCode, a.Sex, a.TeacherName, a.TeacherEName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.Birthday, 111) AS Birthday, a.IsShowBirthday, a.Tel, a.IsShowTel, a.Phone, a.IsShowPhone, a.PostalCode1, a.PostalCode2, a.Address, a.IsShowAddress, a.Email, a.IsShowEmail, a.EmailWork, a.IsShowEmailWork, a.EduLevelHighest, a.EduSchool1, a.EduDept1, a.EduLevel1, a.EduSchool2, a.EduDept2, a.EduLevel2, a.EduSchool3, a.EduDept3, a.EduLevel3, a.ServiceUnit1, a.JobTitle1, a.ServiceUnit2, a.JobTitle2, a.ExpertiseDesc, a.ExpertiseCode, a.TeachJobAbilityDC, a.TeachJobAbilityBC, a.TeachJobAbilityKC, a.TeachArea, a.TeachIndustryDetCode, a.WorkHistory, a.ProLicense, a.SelfIntroduction, a.SelfPicPath, a.PublicCore, a.Online, a.JoinYear, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.OfflineDate, 111) AS OfflineDate, a.OfflineReason, a.OfflineReasonRemark, a.HomePageCarousel, a.CreatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.CreatedDatetime, 120) AS CreatedDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, (select b.EduName from Edu b WHERE a.EduLevelHighest=b.EduLevel) AS EduLevelHighest_Name, (select c1.EduName from Edu c1 WHERE a.EduLevel1=c1.EduLevel) AS EduLevel1_Name, (select c2.EduName from Edu c2 WHERE a.EduLevel2=c2.EduLevel) AS EduLevel2_Name, (select c3.EduName from Edu c3 WHERE a.EduLevel3=c3.EduLevel) AS EduLevel3_Name, (SELECT bb.ExpertiseName + ',' FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.ExpertiseCode, ',') aa LEFT JOIN Expertise bb ON aa.value=bb.ExpertiseCode FOR XML PATH('')) AS Expertise_Str, (SELECT aa.IndustryName + ',' FROM IndustryDet aa WHERE aa.IndustryCode IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachIndustryDetCode,',')) FOR XML PATH('')) AS IndustryStr, a.IndustryAcademicType, a.ServiceUnitProperties, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_DC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_DC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_DC,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_DC, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_BC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_BC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_BC,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_BC, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_KC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_KC,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_KC,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_KC, isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r1.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_TOTAL,0) as R1_THOURS_TRANSDATA_TOTAL, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_DC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_DC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_DC,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_DC, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_BC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_BC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_BC,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_BC, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_KC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_KC,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_KC,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_KC, isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_D_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_S_TOTAL,0)+isnull(r2.THOURS_TRANSDATA_K_TOTAL,0) as R2_THOURS_TRANSDATA_TOTAL FROM Teacher a LEFT JOIN ReviewReport r1 ON r1.Year=cast(Year(GETDATE())-1 as varchar(4)) and r1.IDNO=a.IDNO LEFT JOIN ReviewReport r2 ON r2.Year=cast(Year(GETDATE()) as varchar(4)) and r2.IDNO=a.IDNO WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT a.IndustryMstCode AS MSTID, a.IndustryCode AS DETID, b.IndustryName AS MSTNAME, a.IndustryName AS DETNAME FROM IndustryDet a LEFT JOIN IndustryMst b ON a.IndustryMstCode=b.IndustryCode WHERE a.Actived='Y' AND b.Actived='Y' ORDER BY a.OrderBy, b.OrderBy

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY tmp.UpdatedDatetime DESC, tmp.UnitCode) AS ROWID ,* FROM ( SELECT a.Year, a.PlanCode, a.PlanID, a.PlanID AS TrainID, '' AS ClassID, '1' AS PlanTypeCode, '大專就業學程' AS PlanTypeText, a.UnitCode, a.UnitName, a.TeacherID, a.TeacherName, a.SchoolName AS ApplyUnit, a.SchoolName AS TrainingUnit, a.ClassName, a.TrainingDateS, a.TrainingDateE, a.ClassDateS, a.ClassDateE, a.JobAbilityCode, a.CourseUnitCode, a.TeachHours, a.TeachNum, a.QuestLink,a.QuesSearchLink, CONVERT(nvarchar(10),null) TrainingType, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, CAST(CAST( CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(( CAST(ISNULL(Q1 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q2 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q3 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q4 ,'0') AS FLOAT) +CAST(ISNULL(Q5 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q6 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q7 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q8 ,'0') AS FLOAT) +CAST(ISNULL(Q9 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q10,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q11,'0') AS FLOAT) )/11>=4,1,0)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT) / CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(StudentID,'')='',0,1)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT)*100 AS INT) AS NVARCHAR) AS Satisfy, CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(StudentID,'')='',0,1)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT) AS FillStudentNum FROM TransData_D_Class a WHERE 1=1
AND dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2))=#Year# AND a.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND a.SchoolName LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND a.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND a.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%' AND a.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%'
AND a.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode IN ($TeacherUnit$) AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1) <=#Year#)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=a.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
UNION ALL SELECT b.Year, b.PlanCode, b.TrainID AS PlanID, b.TrainID, b.ClassID ,'2' AS PlanTypeCode ,'小人提' AS PlanTypeText ,b.UnitCode, b.UnitName ,b.TeacherID, b.TeacherName ,b.JoinCompany AS ApplyUnit ,b.TrainingUnit AS TrainingUnit ,b.ClassName ,b.TrainingTimeS AS TrainingDateS ,b.TrainingTimeE AS TrainingDateE ,b.ClassDateS ,b.ClassDateE ,b.JobAbilityCode ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.TeachHours ,b.TeachNum ,b.QuestLink,null QuesSearchLink ,b.TrainingType ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime ,dbo.FN_GET_Satisfy_AM_S(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) Satisfy ,dbo.FN_GET_FillStudentNum_AM_S(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) FillStudentNum FROM TransData_S_Class b WHERE 1=1
AND b.Year = #Year# AND b.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND b.TrainingUnit LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND b.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND b.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%' AND b.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%'
AND b.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode IN ($TeacherUnit$) AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=#Year#)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=b.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
UNION ALL SELECT b.Year, b.PlanCode, b.TrainID AS PlanID, b.TrainID,convert(nvarchar(50),b.ClassID) ClassID ,'3' AS PlanTypeCode,'大人提' AS PlanTypeText ,b.UnitCode, b.UnitName ,b.TeacherID, b.TeacherName ,b.JoinCompany AS ApplyUnit ,b.TrainingUnit AS TrainingUnit ,b.ClassName ,b.TrainingTimeS AS TrainingDateS ,b.TrainingTimeE AS TrainingDateE ,b.ClassDateS ,b.ClassDateE ,b.JobAbilityCode ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.TeachHours ,b.TeachNum ,b.QuestLink,null QuesSearchLink ,b.TrainingType ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime ,dbo.FN_GET_Satisfy_AM_K(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) Satisfy ,dbo.FN_GET_FillStudentNum_AM_K(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) FillStudentNum FROM TransData_K_Class b WHERE 1=1
AND b.Year = #Year# AND b.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND b.TrainingUnit LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND b.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND b.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%' AND b.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%'
AND b.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode IN ($TeacherUnit$) AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=#Year#)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=b.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
) tmp ORDER BY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY tmp.UpdatedDatetime DESC, tmp.UnitCode)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.UpdatedDatetime DESC, a.UnitCode) AS ROWID, a.Year, a.PlanCode, a.PlanID, a.PlanID AS TrainID, '' AS ClassID, '1' AS PlanTypeCode, '大專就業學程' AS PlanTypeText, a.UnitCode, a.UnitName, a.TeacherID, a.TeacherName, a.SchoolName AS ApplyUnit, a.SchoolName AS TrainingUnit, a.ClassName, a.TrainingDateS, a.TrainingDateE, a.ClassDateS, a.ClassDateE, a.JobAbilityCode, a.CourseUnitCode, a.TeachHours, a.TeachNum, a.QuestLink,a.QuesSearchLink, CONVERT(nvarchar(10),null) TrainingType, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, CAST(CAST( CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(( CAST(ISNULL(Q1 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q2 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q3 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q4 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q5 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+ CAST(ISNULL(Q6 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q7 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q8 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q9 ,'0') AS FLOAT)+CAST(ISNULL(Q10,'0') AS FLOAT)+ CAST(ISNULL(Q11,'0') AS FLOAT) )/11>=4,1,0)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT) / CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(StudentID,'')='',0,1)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT)*100 AS INT) AS NVARCHAR) AS Satisfy, CAST(( SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(StudentID,'')='',0,1)) FROM TransData_D_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID ) AS FLOAT) AS FillStudentNum FROM TransData_D_Class a WHERE 1=1
AND dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2))=#Year# AND a.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND a.SchoolName LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND a.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND a.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%' AND a.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%'
AND a.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode IN ($TeacherUnit$) AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=#Year#)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=a.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
ORDER BY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.UpdatedDatetime DESC, a.UnitCode)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode) AS ROWID ,b.Year, b.PlanCode, b.TrainID AS PlanID, b.TrainID, b.ClassID ,'2' AS PlanTypeCode,'小人提' AS PlanTypeText ,b.UnitCode, b.UnitName ,b.TeacherID, b.TeacherName ,b.JoinCompany AS ApplyUnit ,b.TrainingUnit AS TrainingUnit ,b.ClassName ,b.TrainingTimeS AS TrainingDateS ,b.TrainingTimeE AS TrainingDateE ,b.ClassDateS ,b.ClassDateE ,b.JobAbilityCode ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.TeachHours ,b.TeachNum ,b.QuestLink,null QuesSearchLink ,b.TrainingType ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime ,dbo.FN_GET_Satisfy_AM_S(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) Satisfy ,dbo.FN_GET_FillStudentNum_AM_S(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) FillStudentNum FROM TransData_S_Class b WHERE 1=1
AND b.Year = #Year# AND b.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND b.TrainingUnit LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND b.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND b.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%' AND b.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%'
AND b.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode IN ($TeacherUnit$) AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=#Year#)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=b.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
ORDER BY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode)

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode) AS ROWID ,b.Year, b.PlanCode, b.TrainID AS PlanID, b.TrainID,convert(nvarchar(50),b.ClassID) ClassID ,'3' AS PlanTypeCode,'大人提' AS PlanTypeText ,b.UnitCode, b.UnitName ,b.TeacherID, b.TeacherName ,b.JoinCompany AS ApplyUnit ,b.TrainingUnit AS TrainingUnit ,b.ClassName ,b.TrainingTimeS AS TrainingDateS ,b.TrainingTimeE AS TrainingDateE ,b.ClassDateS ,b.ClassDateE ,b.JobAbilityCode ,b.CourseUnitCode ,b.TeachHours ,b.TeachNum ,b.QuestLink,null QuesSearchLink ,b.TrainingType ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, b.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime ,dbo.FN_GET_Satisfy_AM_K(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) Satisfy ,dbo.FN_GET_FillStudentNum_AM_K(b.Year,b.TrainID,b.ClassID,b.CourseUnitCode,b.TeacherID) FillStudentNum FROM TransData_K_Class b WHERE 1=1
AND b.Year = #Year# AND b.UnitCode IN ($Units$) AND b.TrainingUnit LIKE '%' + #TrainingUnit# + '%' AND b.JobAbilityCode = #JobAbilityCode# AND b.CourseUnitCode LIKE '%' + #CourseUnitCode# + '%' AND b.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%'
AND b.TeacherID IN (SELECT IDNO FROM Teacher WHERE UnitCode IN ($TeacherUnit$) AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=#Year#)
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM Teacher t WHERE t.IDNO=b.TeacherID AND NOT ISNULL(YEAR(t.OfflineDate),YEAR(GETDATE())+1)<=ISNULL(#Year#,YEAR(GETDATE())) )
ORDER BY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY b.UpdatedDatetime DESC, b.UnitCode)

/* '1' AS PlanTypeCode, '大專就業學程' AS PlanTypeText */ SELECT Year /*PK*/ ,dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(ClassDateS,11,2)) ACYear ,PlanCode,UnitCode,UnitName,PlanID /*PK*/ ,SchoolName,ClassName,TrainingDateS,TrainingDateE,ClassDateS,ClassDateE ,TeacherID,TeacherName,JobAbilityCode,CourseUnitCode /*PK*/ ,TeachHours,TeachNum,QuestLink,QuesSearchLink ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, UpdatedDatetime, 120) UpdatedDatetime FROM TransData_D_Class WHERE dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(ClassDateS,11,2))=#ACYear#

/* '2' AS PlanTypeCode,'小人提' AS PlanTypeText */ SELECT d.Year ,d.PlanCode ,d.UnitCode ,d.TrainID /*PK*/ ,d.ClassID /*PK*/ ,d.ClassName ,d.CourseUnitCode /*PK*/ ,d.TeacherID /*PK*/ ,d.TeacherName ,d.StudentID /*PK*/ ,d.StudentName ,d.PersonWorkExp ,d.DutyType ,d.FillDate /*PK*/ ,d.Q1,d.Q2,d.Q3,d.Q4,d.Q5,d.Q6,d.Q7,d.Q8,d.Q9,d.Q10,d.Q11 ,d.Suggest ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, d.UpdatedDatetime, 120) UpdatedDatetime ,b.ClassDateS /*PK*/ ,b.ClassDateE ,b.TrainingTimeS FROM TransData_S_Satisfy d JOIN TransData_S_Class b on d.Year=b.Year AND d.TrainID=b.TrainID AND d.ClassID=b.ClassID AND d.CourseUnitCode=b.CourseUnitCode AND d.TeacherID=b.TeacherID WHERE b.ClassDateS=#ClassDateS# and b.CourseUnitCode=#CourseUnitCode# and b.TeacherID=#TeacherID# AND b.TrainingTimeS=#TrainingTimeS#

/* '2' AS PlanTypeCode,'小人提' AS PlanTypeText */ SELECT TeacherID,TeacherName,ClassName,CourseUnitCode,ClassDateS,TrainingTimeS ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, MAX(UpdatedDatetime), 120) UpdatedDatetime ,MAX([Year]) Year ,MAX(PlanCode) PlanCode ,MAX(TrainID) TrainID ,MIN(ClassID) ClassID ,MAX(UnitCode) UnitCode ,MAX(UnitName) UnitName ,MAX(JoinCompany) JoinCompany ,MAX(TrainingUnit) TrainingUnit ,MAX(TrainingTimeE) TrainingTimeE ,MAX(ClassDateE) ClassDateE ,MAX(JobAbilityCode) JobAbilityCode ,MAX(TeachHours) TeachHours ,MAX(TeachNum) TeachNum ,MAX(QuestLink) QuestLink FROM TransData_S_Class WHERE Year=#Year# GROUP BY TeacherID,TeacherName,ClassName,CourseUnitCode,ClassDateS,TrainingTimeS

/* '3' AS PlanTypeCode,'大人提' AS PlanTypeText */ SELECT TeacherID,TeacherName,ClassName,CourseUnitCode,ClassDateS,TrainingTimeS ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, MAX(UpdatedDatetime), 120) UpdatedDatetime ,MAX([Year]) Year ,MAX(PlanCode) PlanCode ,MAX(TrainID) TrainID ,MIN(ClassID) ClassID ,MAX(UnitCode) UnitCode ,MAX(UnitName) UnitName ,MAX(JoinCompany) JoinCompany ,MAX(TrainingUnit) TrainingUnit ,MAX(TrainingTimeE) TrainingTimeE ,MAX(ClassDateE) ClassDateE ,MAX(JobAbilityCode) JobAbilityCode ,MAX(TeachHours) TeachHours ,MAX(TeachHours_X) TeachHours_X ,MAX(TeachNum) TeachNum ,MAX(QuestLink) QuestLink FROM TransData_K_Class WHERE Year=#Year# GROUP BY TeacherID,TeacherName,ClassName,CourseUnitCode,ClassDateS,TrainingTimeS

/* '3' AS PlanTypeCode,'大人提' AS PlanTypeText */ SELECT d.Year ,d.PlanCode ,d.UnitCode ,d.TrainID /*PK*/ ,d.ClassID /*PK*/ ,d.ClassName ,d.CourseUnitCode /*PK*/ ,d.TeacherID /*PK*/ ,d.TeacherName ,d.StudentID /*PK*/ ,d.StudentName ,d.PersonWorkExp ,d.DutyType ,d.FillDate /*PK*/ ,d.Q1,d.Q2,d.Q3,d.Q4,d.Q5,d.Q6,d.Q7,d.Q8,d.Q9,d.Q10,d.Q11 ,d.Suggest ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, d.UpdatedDatetime, 120) UpdatedDatetime ,b.ClassDateS /*PK*/ ,b.ClassDateE ,b.TrainingTimeS FROM TransData_K_Satisfy d JOIN TransData_K_Class b on d.Year=b.Year AND d.TrainID=b.TrainID AND d.ClassID=b.ClassID AND d.CourseUnitCode=b.CourseUnitCode AND d.TeacherID=b.TeacherID /*WHERE b.ClassDateS='2025/02/19' and b.CourseUnitCode='BC2' and b.TeacherID='M220826334' AND b.TrainingTimeS='09:00'*/ WHERE b.ClassDateS=#ClassDateS# and b.CourseUnitCode=#CourseUnitCode# and b.TeacherID=#TeacherID# and b.TrainingTimeS=#TrainingTimeS#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.MeetingDateS DESC, a.MeetingDateE DESC) AS ROWID, a.Seq,a.MeetingName,a.MeetingType, /*CONVERT(NVARCHAR, ISNULL(a.MeetingDateS, ''), 111) + IIF(ISNULL(a.MeetingDateE, '') = '', '', ' ~ ' + CONVERT(NVARCHAR, ISNULL(a.MeetingDateE, ''), 111)) AS MeetingDate*/ CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 111) AS MeetingDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 111) AS MeetingDateE, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeS, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeE, a.Location, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 120) AS SignUpDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 120) AS SignUpDateE FROM Meeting a WHERE 1=1
AND a.MeetingType = #MeetingType# AND a.MeetingName LIKE '%' + #MeetingName# + '%' AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 112) >= #MeetingDateS# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 112) <= #MeetingDateE# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 112) >= #SignUpDateS# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 112) <= #SignUpDateE# AND (SELECT COUNT(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(#CreatedUnit#, ',') WHERE value=a.CreatedUnit)>=1 AND (SELECT COUNT(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(#MeetLocated#, ',') WHERE CHARINDEX(value, a.Address)>=1)>=1 $IsSignUpStop_forSQL$
ORDER BY a.MeetingDateS DESC, a.MeetingDateE DESC

SELECT a.Seq, a.Year, a.MeetingType, a.MeetingName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 111) AS MeetingDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 111) AS MeetingDateE, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeS, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeE, a.Days, a.PostalCode1, a.PostalCode2, a.Location, a.Address, a.MaximumPeople, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS SignUpDateS, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS SignUpDateE, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingRelease, 120) AS MeetingRelease, a.CreatedUnit, a.Remark, a.PicName, a.PicHint, a.PicAlign, a.CreatedAccount, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.CreatedDatetime, 120) AS CreatedDatetime, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM Meeting a WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.MeetingSeq, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MeetingAttached a WHERE a.MeetingSeq=#Seq#

SELECT a.Seq ,concat(dbo.FN_CDATE(a.MeetingDateS),' ~ ',dbo.FN_CDATE(a.MeetingDateE)) MeetingDate ,format(a.TimeS,'HH:mm')+' ~ '+format(a.TimeE,'HH:mm') MeetingTime ,concat(dbo.FN_CDATETIME(a.SignUpDateS),' ~ ',dbo.FN_CDATETIME(a.SignUpDateE)) SignUpDateTime ,a.MeetingType, a.CreatedUnit, a.MeetingName, a.Location, a.MaximumPeople FROM Meeting a WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

WITH WC1 AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID ,a.Seq, a.MeetingSeq ,a.TeacherAccount,b.TeacherName ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDatetime, 120) AS SignUpDatetime ,a.SignUpType, a.UpdatedAccount ,CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MeetingSignUp a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT WHERE a.MeetingSeq=#Seq# ) SELECT * FROM WC1 WHERE ROWID >=#MINROW# AND ROWID <=#MAXROW#
statements.update: UPDATE Meeting SET Year = #Year#, MeetingType = #MeetingType#, MeetingName = #MeetingName#, MeetingDateS = #MeetingDateS#, MeetingDateE = #MeetingDateE#, MeetingRelease = #MeetingRelease#, Days = #Days#, TimeS = #TimeS#, TimeE = #TimeE#, Location = #Location#, PostalCode1 = #PostalCode1#, PostalCode2 = #PostalCode2#, Address = #Address#, MaximumPeople = #MaximumPeople#, SignUpDateS = #SignUpDateS#, SignUpDateE = #SignUpDateE#, Remark = #Remark#, PicName = #PicName#, PicHint = #PicHint#, PicAlign = #PicAlign#, /*SignUpState = #SignUpState#,*/ CreatedUnit = #CreatedUnit#, CreatedAccount = #CreatedAccount#, CreatedDatetime = #CreatedDatetime#, UpdatedAccount = #UpdatedAccount#, UpdatedDatetime = #UpdatedDatetime# WHERE Seq=#Seq#
statements.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID, a.ACCOUNT AS TeacherAccount, a.TeacherName FROM Teacher a WHERE 1=1
AND a.TeacherName LIKE '%' + #TeacherName# + '%' AND a.UnitCode = #UnitCode#
statements.delete: DELETE FROM MeetingAttend WHERE MeetingSeq = #MeetingSeq# AND TeacherAccount = #TeacherAccount#
statements.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.MeetingDateS DESC, a.MeetingDateE DESC) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.MeetingName, a.MeetingType, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 111) AS MeetingDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 111) AS MeetingDateE, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeS, SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS TimeE, a.Location FROM Meeting a WHERE 1=1
AND a.MeetingType = #MeetingType# AND a.MeetingName LIKE '%' + #MeetingName# + '%' AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 112) >= #MeetingDateS# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 112) <= #MeetingDateE# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 112) >= #SignUpDateS# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 112) <= #SignUpDateE# AND (SELECT COUNT(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(#CreatedUnit#, ',') WHERE value=a.CreatedUnit)>=1 AND (SELECT COUNT(value) FROM STRING_SPLIT(#MeetLocated#, ',') WHERE CHARINDEX(value, a.Address)>=1)>=1
AND a.Seq IN ( select a.MeetingSeq from MeetingAttend a JOIN Teacher t on t.ACCOUNT=a.TeacherAccount where t.TeacherName=#TeacherName# )
ORDER BY a.MeetingDateS DESC, a.MeetingDateE DESC

SELECT a.Seq, CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.MeetingDateS)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.MeetingDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.MeetingDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ~ ' + CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.MeetingDateE)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.MeetingDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.MeetingDateE) AS NVARCHAR) AS MeetingDate, /*CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 111) AS a.MeetingDateS,*/ /*CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 111) AS a.MeetingDateE,*/ SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) + ' ~ ' + SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS MeetingTime, /*SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS a.SignUpDateS,*/ /*SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS a.SignUpDateE,*/ CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.SignUpDateS)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ':' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(MINUTE, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ' ~ ' + CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.SignUpDateE)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ':' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(MINUTE, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR), 2) AS SignUpDateTime, a.MeetingType, a.MeetingName, a.Location, a.MaximumPeople FROM Meeting a WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#

WITH WC1 AS ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Seq) AS ROWID, a.Seq,a.MeetingSeq,a.TeacherAccount,b.TeacherName, c.UnitShortName AS UnitName, a.Attend,a.TestPassed,a.TestScore,a.Remark,a.MadForced, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR,a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM MeetingAttend a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT LEFT JOIN Unit c ON b.UnitCode=c.UnitCode WHERE a.MeetingSeq=#Seq# ) SELECT * FROM WC1 WHERE ROWID >=#MINROW# AND ROWID <=#MAXROW#
statements.update: UPDATE MeetingAttend SET Attend=#Attend#, TestPassed=#TestPassed#, TestScore=#TestScore#, Remark=#Remark#, UpdatedAccount=#UpdatedAccount#,UpdatedDatetime=GETDATE() WHERE Seq=#Seq#
UPDATE MeetingAttend SET Attend=#Attend#, TestPassed=#TestPassed#, Remark=#Remark#, UpdatedAccount=#UpdatedAccount#,UpdatedDatetime=GETDATE() WHERE Seq=#Seq#
UPDATE MeetingAttend SET Attend=#Attend#, Remark=#Remark#, UpdatedAccount=#UpdatedAccount#,UpdatedDatetime=GETDATE() WHERE Seq=#Seq#
UPDATE MeetingAttend SET MadForced=CASE WHEN #MadForced#='N' THEN NULL ELSE #MadForced# END WHERE Seq=#Seq#
statements.select:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.MeetingDateS DESC, a.MeetingDateE DESC) AS ROWID, a.Seq, CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.MeetingDateS)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.MeetingDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.MeetingDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ~ ' + CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.MeetingDateE)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.MeetingDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.MeetingDateE) AS NVARCHAR) AS MeetingDate, /*CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateS, 111) AS a.MeetingDateS,*/ /*CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.MeetingDateE, 111) AS a.MeetingDateE,*/ SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeS, 114), 1, 5) + ' ~ ' + SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.TimeE, 114), 1, 5) AS MeetingTime, /*SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateS, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS a.SignUpDateS,*/ /*SUBSTRING(CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.SignUpDateE, 120), 1, 16) + ':00' AS a.SignUpDateE,*/ CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.SignUpDateS)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ':' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(MINUTE, a.SignUpDateS) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ' ~ ' + CAST(DATEPART(YEAR, a.SignUpDateE)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(MONTH, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + '/' + CAST(DATEPART(DAY, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR) + ' ' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(HOUR, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR), 2) + ':' + RIGHT(REPLICATE('0', 2) + CAST(DATEPART(MINUTE, a.SignUpDateE) AS NVARCHAR), 2) AS SignUpDateTime, a.MeetingType, a.MeetingName, a.Location, a.MaximumPeople, a.CreatedUnit FROM Meeting a WHERE 1=1
AND a.MeetingType = #MeetingType#
ORDER BY a.MeetingDateS DESC, a.MeetingDateE DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.IsOnTop DESC, a.PostDateS DESC, a.PostDateE DESC ) AS ROWID, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 120) AS PostDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 120) AS PostDateE, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, a.Seq, a.PostType, a.PostCaption, a.PostTo, a.PostContent, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.IsOnTop, a.IsShowSignUp, a.MeetingSeq, IIF(GETDATE()>=b.SignUpDateS AND GETDATE()<=b.SignUpDateE,1,0) AS isCanSignUp, a.PublishedUnit, a.OrderBy, a.Actived, a.UpdatedAccount FROM MsgPost a LEFT JOIN Meeting b ON a.MeetingSeq=b.Seq WHERE ISNULL(a.Actived,'Y')!='N' AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 120)<=GETDATE() AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 120)>=GETDATE()
AND a.PostType = #PostType# AND a.PostTo <= $PostTo$
AND ( (b.MeetingType IS NULL) OR (b.MeetingType='1') OR (b.MeetingType='2' AND b.CreatedUnit IN ('0', '$CreatedUnit$')) )
AND a.PostCaption + CAST(a.PostContent AS nvarchar(4000)) LIKE '%' + #KeyWord# + '%' AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 112) >= #PostDate_A# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 112) <= #PostDate_B#
ORDER BY a.IsOnTop DESC, a.PostDateS DESC, a.PostDateE DESC, a.PostCaption

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.IsOnTop DESC, a.PostDateS DESC, a.PostDateE DESC ) AS ROWID, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 120) AS PostDateS, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 120) AS PostDateE, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, a.Seq, a.PostType, a.PostCaption, a.PostTo, a.PostContent, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.IsOnTop, a.IsShowSignUp, a.MeetingSeq, IIF(GETDATE()>=b.SignUpDateS AND GETDATE()<=b.SignUpDateE,1,0) AS isCanSignUp, a.PublishedUnit, a.OrderBy, a.Actived, a.UpdatedAccount FROM MsgPost a LEFT JOIN Meeting b ON a.MeetingSeq=b.Seq WHERE ISNULL(a.Actived,'Y')!='N' AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 120)<=GETDATE() AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 120)>=GETDATE()
AND a.PostType = #PostType# AND a.PostTo <= $PostTo$
AND ( (b.MeetingType IS NULL) OR (b.MeetingType='1') OR (b.MeetingType='2' AND b.CreatedUnit IN ('0', '$CreatedUnit$')) )
AND a.PostCaption + CAST(a.PostContent AS nvarchar(4000)) LIKE '%' + #KeyWord# + '%' AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateS, 112) >= #PostDate_A# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.PostDateE, 112) <= #PostDate_B#
ORDER BY a.IsOnTop DESC, a.PostDateS DESC, a.PostDateE DESC, a.PostCaption

SELECT a.Seq, a.Year, CAST(CAST(a.Year AS INT)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) AS YearName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 120) AS FirstTime, b.TeacherName, a.AuditStatus, concat(c.JobAbilityName,'(',c.JobAbilityCode,')') AS JobAbilityName FROM SelfReport a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT LEFT JOIN JobAbility c ON a.JobAbilityCode=c.JobAbilityCode AND c.Actived='Y' WHERE ISNULL(a.AuditStatus,'')<>'' AND a.AuditStatus<>' '
AND a.AuditStatus = #AuditStatus# AND b.UnitCode = #UnitCode#
ORDER BY a.UpdatedDatetime DESC
SELECT * FROM Teacher WHERE ACCOUNT=#ACCOUNT#
SELECT * FROM MsgPost WHERE Seq=#Seq#
SELECT * FROM Meeting WHERE Seq=#Seq#
SELECT * FROM MeetingAttached WHERE MeetingSeq=#Seq#
SELECT * FROM MeetingSignUp WHERE MeetingSeq=#Seq#
SELECT * FROM MeetingAttend WHERE MeetingSeq=#Seq#
SELECT * FROM MeetingSignUp WHERE MeetingSeq=#MeetingSeq# AND TeacherAccount=#TeacherAccount#
SELECT * FROM MeetingAttend WHERE MeetingSeq=#MeetingSeq# AND TeacherAccount=#TeacherAccount#
SELECT * FROM MeetingSignUp WHERE Seq=#Seq#
SELECT * FROM MeetingAttend WHERE Seq=#Seq#
SELECT * FROM Report WHERE Year=#Year# AND UnitCode=#UnitCode#
SELECT * FROM ReportRecord WHERE Seq=#Seq#
SELECT * FROM Notices WHERE Seq=#Seq#
SELECT * FROM NoticesAttached WHERE NoticesSeq=#Seq#

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.UnitCode, a.TeacherName) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.ACCOUNT, a.IDNO, a.UnitCode, a.Sex, a.TeacherName, a.TeacherEName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.Birthday, 111) AS Birthday, a.IsShowBirthday, a.Tel, a.IsShowTel, a.Phone, a.IsShowPhone, a.PostalCode1, a.PostalCode2, a.Address, a.IsShowAddress, a.Email, a.IsShowEmail, a.EmailWork, a.IsShowEmailWork, a.EduLevelHighest, a.EduSchool1, a.EduDept1, a.EduLevel1, a.EduSchool2, a.EduDept2, a.EduLevel2, a.EduSchool3, a.EduDept3, a.EduLevel3, a.ServiceUnit1, a.JobTitle1, a.ServiceUnit2, a.JobTitle2, a.ExpertiseDesc, a.ExpertiseCode, a.TeachJobAbilityDC, a.TeachJobAbilityBC, a.TeachJobAbilityKC, a.TeachArea, a.TeachIndustryDetCode, a.WorkHistory, a.ProLicense, a.SelfIntroduction, a.SelfPicPath, a.PublicCore, a.Online, a.JoinYear, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.OfflineDate, 111) AS OfflineDate, a.OfflineReason, a.OfflineReasonRemark, a.HomePageCarousel, a.CreatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.CreatedDatetime, 120) AS CreatedDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, b.EduName AS EduLevelHighest_Name, c1.EduName AS EduLevel1_Name, c2.EduName AS EduLevel2_Name, c3.EduName AS EduLevel3_Name, (SELECT bb.ExpertiseName + ',' FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.ExpertiseCode, ',') aa LEFT JOIN Expertise bb ON aa.value=bb.ExpertiseCode FOR XML PATH('')) AS Expertise_Str, (SELECT aa.IndustryName + ',' FROM IndustryDet aa WHERE aa.IndustryCode IN (SELECT value FROM STRING_SPLIT(a.TeachIndustryDetCode,',')) FOR XML PATH('')) AS IndustryStr, a.IndustryAcademicType, a.ServiceUnitProperties FROM Teacher a LEFT JOIN Edu b ON a.EduLevelHighest=b.EduLevel LEFT JOIN Edu c1 ON a.EduLevel1=c1.EduLevel LEFT JOIN Edu c2 ON a.EduLevel2=c2.EduLevel LEFT JOIN Edu c3 ON a.EduLevel3=c3.EduLevel WHERE 1=1
AND a.UnitCode = #Unit# AND a.Online = #Online#
ORDER BY a.UnitCode, a.TeacherName

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Year DESC, a.FirstTime DESC) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.TeacherAccount, a.ReportType, a.JobAbilityCode, a.ReportName, a.FileNameRemark, a.FileNameOrg, a.FileNameNew, a.FileNameType, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 120) AS FirstTime, a.Year, a.AuditStatus, a.AuditAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.AuditDatetime, 120) AS AuditDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, b.TeacherName, b.TeacherEName FROM ReportRecord a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT WHERE a.ReportType='1'
AND b.UnitCode = #UnitCode# AND a.Year = #Year# AND concat(b.TeacherName,b.TeacherEName) LIKE concat('%',#Teacher_Name#,'%') AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 112) >= #FirstTime_S# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 112) <= #FirstTime_E# AND a.AuditStatus = #AuditStatus#
ORDER BY a.Year DESC, a.FirstTime DESC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY a.Year DESC, a.FirstTime DESC) AS ROWID, a.Seq, a.TeacherAccount, a.JobAbilityCode, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 120) AS FirstTime, a.Year, a.AuditStatus, a.AuditReason, a.AuditAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.AuditDatetime, 120) AS AuditDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, b.TeacherName FROM SelfReport a JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT WHERE a.AuditStatus<>'' /* WHERE ISNULL(a.AuditStatus,'')<>'' AND a.AuditStatus<>' ' */
AND a.UnitCode = #UnitCode# AND a.Year = #Year# AND concat(b.TeacherName,b.TeacherEName) LIKE concat('%',#Teacher_Name#,'%') AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 112) >= #FirstTime_S# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 112) <= #FirstTime_E# AND a.AuditStatus = #AuditStatus#
ORDER BY a.Year DESC, a.FirstTime DESC

SELECT a.Seq, a.Year, CAST(CAST(a.Year AS INT)-1911 AS NVARCHAR) AS YearName, a.TeacherAccount, b.TeacherName/*, b.TeacherEName*/, a.UnitCode, a.JobAbilityCode, concat(c.JobAbilityCode,' ',c.JobAbilityName) AS JobAbilityName, a.CourseUnitCode, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.FirstTime, 120) AS FirstTime, a.AuditStatus, a.AuditReason, NULL AS AuditStatus_New, a.AuditAccount, e.USERNAME AS AuditName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.AuditDatetime, 120) AS AuditDatetime, a.UpdatedAccount, f.USERNAME AS UpdatedName, CONVERT(NVARCHAR, a.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime, a.OBJECT_TYPE, a.StudNum, a.TObject, a.TMethod, a.TslidesOrg, a.TslidesNew, a.TslidesType, a.Other, a.StudyGReportOrg, a.StudyGReportNew, a.StudyGReportType, a.WorksheetsOrg, a.WorksheetsNew, a.WorksheetsType, a.HomeWorkOrg, a.HomeWorkNew, a.HomeWorkType, a.ExpReportOrg, a.ExpReportNew, a.ExpReportType, a.ExamOrg, a.ExamNew, a.ExamType, a.Other1Org, a.Other1New, a.Other1Type, a.Other1Remark, a.Other2Org, a.Other2New, a.Other2Type, a.Other2Remark, a.Effect, a.PlanImprove, a.ExamImprove, a.materialsImprove, a.Other3 FROM SelfReport a LEFT JOIN Teacher b ON a.TeacherAccount=b.ACCOUNT LEFT JOIN JobAbility c ON a.JobAbilityCode=c.JobAbilityCode LEFT JOIN AMDBURM e ON a.AuditAccount=e.USERNO LEFT JOIN AMDBURM f ON a.UpdatedAccount=f.USERNO WHERE a.Seq=#Seq#
SELECT * FROM SelfReport WHERE Seq=#Seq#

SELECT ds.Year,ds.PlanCode,ds.UnitCode,ds.PlanID ,ds.ClassName,ds.CourseUnitCode ,ds.TeacherID,ds.TeacherName ,ds.StudentID,ds.StudentName ,ds.Dept,ds.[Identity],ds.FillDate ,ds.Q1,ds.Q2,ds.Q3,ds.Q4 ,ds.Q5,ds.Q6,ds.Q7,ds.Q8 ,ds.Q9,ds.Q10,ds.Q11 ,ds.Suggest ,CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), ds.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime ,dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2)) ACTUALYEAR FROM TransData_D_Class a JOIN TransData_D_Satisfy ds on ds.Year=a.Year AND ds.PlanID=a.PlanID AND ds.CourseUnitCode=a.CourseUnitCode AND ds.TeacherID=a.TeacherID WHERE dbo.FN_GET_ACTUALYEAR(SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,5,3),SUBSTRING(a.ClassDateS,11,2))=#ACTUALYEAR#

SELECT ds.Year,ds.PlanCode,ds.UnitCode ,ds.TrainID,ds.ClassID ,ds.ClassName,ds.CourseUnitCode ,ds.TeacherID ,ds.TeacherName ,ds.StudentID ,ds.StudentName ,ds.PersonWorkExp,ds.DutyType,ds.FillDate ,ds.Q1,ds.Q2,ds.Q3,ds.Q4 ,ds.Q5,ds.Q6,ds.Q7,ds.Q8 ,ds.Q9,ds.Q10,ds.Q11 ,ds.Suggest ,CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), ds.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM TransData_S_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=#Year#

SELECT ds.Year,ds.PlanCode,ds.UnitCode ,ds.TrainID,ds.ClassID ,ds.ClassName,ds.CourseUnitCode ,ds.TeacherID ,ds.TeacherName ,ds.StudentID ,ds.StudentName ,ds.PersonWorkExp,ds.DutyType,ds.FillDate ,ds.Q1,ds.Q2,ds.Q3,ds.Q4 ,ds.Q5,ds.Q6,ds.Q7,ds.Q8 ,ds.Q9,ds.Q10,ds.Q11 ,ds.Suggest ,CONVERT(VARCHAR(20), ds.UpdatedDatetime, 120) AS UpdatedDatetime FROM TransData_K_Satisfy ds WHERE ds.Year=#Year#
